overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character crosses a busy intersection surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows, then proceeds along wet streets reflecting colorful advertisements before walking under a large overpass structure with prominent digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with illuminated crosswalks

events.description: futuristic vehicles drive past the crosswalk as the character waits and then proceeds
character turns right at the intersection corner to walk along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across a multi-lane intersection with yellow striped crosswalks, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with grid-patterned illuminated windows and yellow accent lighting
large dark angular overpass with glowing advertisement displays underneath
large illuminated sign displaying 'COLA' in white letters against red background
tall pole with horizontal traffic signal arms and red lights
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a futuristic city intersection at night, surrounded by towering glass buildings with illuminated windows. The wet streets reflect the neon lights as the character crosses the multi-lane road, navigating around passing vehicles. The large overpass structure with commercial signage looms on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street lined with palm trees and modern office buildings

events.description: character continues walking straight down the street between tall buildings
character turns around to walk back toward the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk next to glass office towers, then turning to return toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: person in casual clothing walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: narrow corridor formed by towering futuristic buildings extending into the distance
palm trees planted along the sidewalk edge in concrete planters
yellow and white striped concrete blocks separating pedestrian walkway from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the downtown sidewalk bordered by palm trees and concrete barriers, the character moves between modern glass office towers. The street is relatively quiet with occasional pedestrians and passing cars. The character then turns to head back toward the illuminated overpass visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under commercial overpass with digital advertising

events.description: character enters the covered area beneath the large overpass structure
crowd density increases as character approaches the busy underpass area

agents.ego_description: walking toward and then under the large overpass structure, passing other pedestrians in the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: person in yellow plaid shirt walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'DREAMLAND' text and stylized graphics
tall digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade
ground floor entrance with large glass windows and illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters the semi-covered walkway beneath the massive overpass structure. The area is dominated by bright digital billboards including the prominent 'COLA' and 'DREAMLAND' signs. The pedestrian traffic increases in this commercial zone, with people walking through the sheltered passage between the towering buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city that shifts from a wide, busy intersection into a dense commercial corridor beneath a massive overpass. It begins with the character crossing a multi-lane road surrounded by towering glass buildings, where wet pavement reflects the vibrant city lights and vehicles pass by. As the character moves onto a downtown sidewalk bordered by palm trees and concrete barriers, the environment becomes momentarily quieter between modern office towers before the camera turns back toward the distant glow of the overpass. The scene then shifts as the character enters the semi-covered walkway, where the open street gives way to a sheltered passage dominated by bright digital billboards for Cola and Dreamland. Finally, the space becomes more crowded with pedestrians as the camera pushes deeper into this illuminated commercial zone nestled between the towering structures.
